items.title: Amgen Inc. (AMGN) Completes Phase 3 Trial for ABP 206 Opdivo Biosimilar Candidate
items.description: Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN) is one of the 10 best stocks to invest in during a recession. On February 27, 2026, Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN)’s Phase 3 study (NCT05907122) saw an update. The study investigating ABP 206, a biosimilar candidate for Opdivo (nivolumab), has officially reached Completed status. The trial enrolled 256 subjects with resected stage III […]
